name: GStack
summary: Workflow skills, browser QA, reviews, and agent orchestration helpers.

install.description: Create the recommended GStack clone directory

install.command: if [ -d "${gstackInstallDir}/.git" ]; then git -C "${gstackInstallDir}" pull --ff-only; else rmdir "${gstackInstallDir}" 2>/dev/null || true; git clone --single-branch --depth 1 https://github.com/garrytan/gstack.git "${gstackInstallDir}"; fi && "${gstackInstallDir}/setup" --host codex

if [ -d "${gstackInstallDir}/.git" ]; then git -C "${gstackInstallDir}" pull --ff-only; else rmdir "${gstackInstallDir}" 2>/dev/null || true; git clone --single-branch --depth 1 https://github.com/garrytan/gstack.git "${gstackInstallDir}"; fi && "${gstackInstallDir}/setup" --host opencode

if [ -d "${gstackInstallDir}/.git" ]; then git -C "${gstackInstallDir}" pull --ff-only; else rmdir "${gstackInstallDir}" 2>/dev/null || true; git clone --single-branch --depth 1 https://github.com/garrytan/gstack.git "${gstackInstallDir}"; fi && "${gstackInstallDir}/setup" --host claude

install.description: Add a managed note about GStack routing
install.value: Use gstack workflow skills when explicitly invoked by the user.

install.description: Record GStack routing notes for OpenCode users

botstack.gstack: Use gstack workflow skills when explicitly invoked by the user.

install.description: Record GStack routing notes for Claude Code users

botstack.gstack: Use gstack workflow skills when explicitly invoked by the user.
